race.comment: CHAYAN (14) brings a similar profile to Tempted, who was an unlucky third in the Slipper last year. Bounced off her gruelling Blue Diamond seventh, with a dominant victory over 1200m in the G2 Reisling Stakes at Randwick. Highly rated two-year-old who will relish the fast tempo. STRETAN RULER (6) made a mess of them in the Sliver Slipper two-back, then warmed up late with a tough second in the G2 Todman Stakes at Randwick. Can stay out of trouble from the draw and close strongly. SPICY MISS (13) has a sense of timing third-up after defeating inferior opposition in the G2 Sweet Embrace over 1200m at Randwick. Handles all conditions and jumps into the box seat. Genuine top-three contender. WARWOVEN (4) stripped fitter with a soft on-pace victory at this track in the G3 Pago Pago over 1200m. Much tougher assignment today from the wide gate. Place best. STREISAND (12) sharp Blue Diamond winner who must peak again in a stronger race if she's to do the double. Prefer the place.
